Elon Musk, a strong supporter of Donald Trump, is now here to support the selling of BOME $TRUMP tokens. GUIDE

BOME TRUMP Instruction

BOME TRUMP fuses BOME and TRUMP cultures into a meme coin. Utilizing blockchain tech and decentralized storage, it immortalizes memes while offering unique trading and engagement opportunities within a revolutionary digital culture.

Airdrop Rule

Each address can claim 7,444,448 $TRUMP. For community support, each claim triggers an airdrop of 7,444,448 $TRUMP to 60 new addresses.
